trades.reasoning: Highest momentum score (95) in the screener with RSI 69.7 in the ideal bullish zone, rising MACD histogram signaling accelerating momentum, and price well above SMA-20 — only affordable top candidate with $519 cash remaining.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted mildly higher in a low-conviction session — S&P 500 up 0.4% and NASDAQ up 0.2%, with no strong directional catalyst. Portfolio holds 6 positions with 4 open slots and only $519 in cash, just above the $500 deployment threshold. Deploying remaining cash into FRO, the top-ranked screener candidate at score 95, to put idle cash to work rather than letting it sit.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted modest gains on Friday as markets consolidated recent moves without a major macro catalyst. The S&P 500 edged up 0.4% and the NASDAQ added 0.2%, reflecting a cautious but steady bid in equities. Investors appeared to hold positions ahead of the weekend rather than make aggressive moves, keeping volatility subdued.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市周五小幅上漲，市場在缺乏重大宏觀催化劑的情況下整固近期漲勢。標普500指數微升0.4%，納斯達克指數上漲0.2%，反映出市場對股票的謹慎但穩定的買盤。投資者傾向在周末前保持觀望，未有積極出擊，令市場波幅維持低位。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is the strategy of buying stocks that have been trending upward and selling those trending downward, based on the idea that assets in motion tend to stay in motion. Indicators like RSI (Relative Strength Index) and MACD help measure momentum — a stock with RSI between 55–70 and a rising MACD histogram is showing healthy, accelerating upward momentum without being dangerously overbought. Today's buy in FRO is a textbook example: the screener assigned it the top score of 95 precisely because all its momentum signals are aligned and pointing up.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資是一種買入上升趨勢股票、賣出下跌趨勢股票的策略，其理念是「趨勢一旦形成，往往會延續」。RSI（相對強弱指數）和MACD等指標可用來衡量動量——RSI介於55至70之間且MACD柱狀圖持續上升，代表股票處於健康的加速上行動量，尚未進入危險的超買區域。今日買入FRO正是教科書式的動量投資案例：篩選器給予其最高評分95分，正是因為所有動量指標均同步向上排列。
